类 Frontend

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    private int
    currentEnrolledCredits(Profile p)
    calculate total credit of student currently selected, to traversing all course and time period to acuumulate the credit make sure student do not exceed the maximum allowed credit
    private void
    handleA(StringTokenizer st)
    This is for adding student, include read information of student, determing information vaild or not information repeat inspection and add to student list Centralize all rules related to student creation including age restrictions, major validity, and credit legitimacy.
    private void
    handleC(StringTokenizer st)
    close a specific course.
    private void
    handleD(StringTokenizer st)
    For student withdrawl the course verify the existence of student and course and also student in course or not.
    private void
    handleE(StringTokenizer st)
    For student course regeister, Will check student exists or not whether course exists, grade require or major restricts are meet or not, and time conflict or credit limit.
    private void
    handleO(StringTokenizer st)
    Create a new course section verify the crouse's exsit, time vaild or not and ensure no confilct with student teacher and classroom to avoid conflict of time and resource
    private void
    handleR(StringTokenizer st)
    Used to remove students from the student list Constructs identity information based on the input And calls the delete operation on the student list provide the capability to maintain student data enable to delete operations
    private boolean
    isAtLeast16(Date dob)
    Use to determine whether a student meets the mimmium age requirement It calculates the actual age requirement by comparing the current system date with the date of birth this method is to encapsulate the age verification and make modification easier in future
    private Profile
    readProfile(StringTokenizer st)
    read name and birthday from input and construct Profile objects reduce code dupilication when reading student identify information
    void
    run()
    This method is for continuously read and write user's input commands after receving Q, the whole program will be ended And the switch will help users to control the program

    从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • 方法详细资料

    • run

      public void run()
      This method is for continuously read and write user's input commands after receving Q, the whole program will be ended And the switch will help users to control the program

    • handleA

      private void handleA(StringTokenizer st)
      This is for adding student, include read information of student, determing information vaild or not information repeat inspection and add to student list Centralize all rules related to student creation including age restrictions, major validity, and credit legitimacy.

    • isAtLeast16

      private boolean isAtLeast16(Date dob)
      Use to determine whether a student meets the mimmium age requirement It calculates the actual age requirement by comparing the current system date with the date of birth this method is to encapsulate the age verification and make modification easier in future

    • handleR

      private void handleR(StringTokenizer st)
      Used to remove students from the student list Constructs identity information based on the input And calls the delete operation on the student list provide the capability to maintain student data enable to delete operations

    • handleO

      private void handleO(StringTokenizer st)
      Create a new course section verify the crouse's exsit, time vaild or not and ensure no confilct with student teacher and classroom to avoid conflict of time and resource

    • handleC

      private void handleC(StringTokenizer st)
      close a specific course. Will check for section and student exists or not make sure delete operation will not destory existing enroll data

    • handleE

      private void handleE(StringTokenizer st)
      For student course regeister, Will check student exists or not whether course exists, grade require or major restricts are meet or not, and time conflict or credit limit. Then finish regeister to maintain the regeister process work well

    • handleD

      private void handleD(StringTokenizer st)
      For student withdrawl the course verify the existence of student and course and also student in course or not. After verified, withdrawl will be process

    • readProfile

      private Profile readProfile(StringTokenizer st)
      read name and birthday from input and construct Profile objects reduce code dupilication when reading student identify information

    • currentEnrolledCredits

      private int currentEnrolledCredits(Profile p)
      calculate total credit of student currently selected, to traversing all course and time period to acuumulate the credit make sure student do not exceed the maximum allowed credit
